review_text: This is the first time that I am using them, they are great. Very nice and accommodating, just all the way around AWESOME. I would recommend them to anyone that needs a GREAT body shop. You can not even tell that my car was wrecked on the back drivers side door.  GREAT WORK !

Hello everyone; I stopped by this body shop and the gentleman was incredibly kind and attentive. He was kind enough to give me an estimate, which was really important to me. I highly recommend going to him. I saw the cars, and they honestly look like they just rolled off the assembly line. His employees are super friendly and very professional. God bless his business, and thank you again.

If you're in need of a reliable body shop for collision repairs and this location is convenient for you, look no further! Mr. Kevin provided exceptional customer service and delivered high-quality work—my car looked brand new when I picked it up. He was highly responsive, professional, and made the entire process seamless and stress-free.

What stood out most was how understanding and accommodating Kevin was regarding my situation. His commitment to customer satisfaction is genuine—he truly prioritizes people over profit. I'm extremely grateful for the service I received and will absolutely return if needed. Highly recommended! #LoyalCustomer

This has definitely bin a scary yet pleasant experience. This was the first time I ever had a accident and needed my whole car done over. I have a 2019 Ford Mustang and it was scary when I had to drop her off but Kevin  at Forest Park  collision made me feel like family and worked with me and stayed I. Communication with every step of my car process. Excellent work. When I picked her up CoCo is my car name coco looked as new as the day I got her. I am forever grateful thank you so much Kevin  for taking care of my car/baby

Someone sideswiped my vehicle on the driver's side demolishing my side mirror. I took it to Forest Park on a recommendation, got an estimate, they ordered the part, a few hiccups on the parts company  end, took the car back, the mirror was installed and I drove away. The establishment was clean, the owner was accommodating. The employees were respectful. Everything was great and I shall be returning for some more work. The price was great as well. No complaints whatsoever!!
Kevin is awesome. He took my car for body repair and returned it in 3 days. Last time I took my car to a body shop it took them months. I would give more stars if I could.
I got my 2017 Toyota bumper replace at Forest Park Collision on August of 2018. The owner was super nice and friendly with excellent customer service. I recommend this place for everyone.

I recently had my repairs done at Forest Park Collision after being given the run around from Calibre collision saying that they deemed my car a total loss. The owner of Forest Park Collision went above and beyond to help me go through my insurance company. Long story short I'm well Satisfied with the repairs on my vehicle. Best decision EVER.
